name: Power Integrations, Inc.
description: Power Integrations, Inc. is a leading innovator in semiconductor technologies for high-voltage power conversion. The company designs and develops mixed-signal integrated circuits and other electronic components used in power supplies for a wide range of applications, including consumer electronics, renewable energy, industrial equipment, and automotive power systems. By utilizing advanced technologies like their proprietary PowiGaN gallium-nitride and EcoSmart energy-efficiency solutions, Power Integrations enables the efficient transmission and consumption of power, helping to reduce energy waste and minimize the number of electronic components required in modern power conversion systems.
